response.justification: Bogdan brings extensive senior-level experience, notably in geospatial data platforms (GISCollective) and high-performance distributed systems. However, his recent technical stack leans heavily toward TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, lacking recent hands-on experience with modern C++ or Rust which are primary requirements for this core routing pipeline role. His systems engineering background suggests he could adapt, but the language gap is significant.
strengths: Proven expertise in geospatial data processing and building open-source GIS applications.
Strong background in engineering low-latency, high-throughput distributed systems.
Senior-level engineering practices including TDD, CI/CD, and demonstrated cross-stack adaptability.
concerns: Lacks recent professional experience with C++ (last used in 2015) and has no Rust experience.
Recent roles are predominantly focused on full-stack web development rather than backend data pipelines.
No explicit experience with routing algorithms or navigation guidance solutions.
